---
title: "Day 2 - Block 1"
subtitle: "Ideation and Idea Validation"
format:
  revealjs:
    footer: "TI Workshop | D2 B1"
---

## Objective

- Turn ideas into falsifiable hypotheses
- Apply fast kill criteria
- Produce one idea-audit artifact

## Ideation funnel

- Generate many candidate ideas
- Screen with feasibility checks
- Validate with falsifiability gates
- Keep only high-potential candidates

## Practical ideation uses

- Map trends and white spaces
- Ask for plausible findings and contradictions
- Document design choices before coding

## Fast kill criteria

- No feasible data source
- Cannot operationalize key variable
- No plausible falsification test
- Ethical boundary unclear

## Hands-on

- Build idea audit for one candidate
- Include one disconfirming test
- Include one lowest-cost next check

## Debrief

- Which assumption failed first?
- What evidence would falsify it?
- What stays human-owned?
